texto: Is it possible that that's all maturity is? Speaking better? Is it possible that everybody in the world, is just a dumb, stupid kid acting like a grown-up because they can sound like one and look like one? It almost seems easy.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Bob Flaherty: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a desenvolvimento pessoal. O trecho “Is it possible that that's all maturity is? Speaking better? Is it possible that everybody in the…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que desenvolvimento-pessoal, coming-of-age, maturity pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de maturity.
